lesson.title: Baking Basics
lesson.description: Understand the fundamentals of baking, including ingredient measurements and oven settings.

steps.instruction: Preheat your oven to the desired temperature.
Measure your ingredients accurately: flour, sugar, butter, etc.
Mix dry ingredients together before adding wet ingredients.
Pour the mixture into a baking dish and place it in the oven.
Bake for the specified time and check for doneness.
